content.text: yes — mira has a confirmed egg allergy, recorded as causing mild hives, and verified by your pediatric office (Riverdale Pediatrics). that's the one allergy on file, so it's worth flagging clearly to any new caregiver: no egg or egg-containing foods (things like baked goods, pasta, sauces, and some processed snacks often contain egg as an ingredient), and letting them know the reaction so far has been mild hives rather than anything more severe. as a practical next step, it can help to write it on a short care card — allergen, likely reaction, and what to do if they see hives (contact you immediately, and clarify with riverdale pediatrics whether an antihistamine has been recommended for on-hand use, since dosing guidance needs to come from them directly).
